creator: freebsd@desserud.org
text:
When installing the game Widelands from the package repository (pkg_add), the older version build 13 is installed. Build 16 was released earlier this year, and this version is available in ports. The version in ports builds and runs fine, but the prebuilt package should be updated as well.

I am sorry if the latest build being in ports invalidates this report. Also I wasn't able to find a list of which prebuilt packages are in different versions of FreeBSD, so I unfortunately don't know if this has been updated in -CURRENT.

How-To-Repeat: pkg_add -r widelands
